pr.title: The Frugendorff: Recursive Weight Sharing + MLP 4x (1.1478 BPB, 15.19MB)

output.summary: Recursive weight sharing loops 6 unique transformer blocks twice, freeing budget to expand each MLP to 4x while staying under 16MB.
techniques: Recursive weight sharing over 6 blocks to simulate 12-layer depth
MLP 4x hidden expansion with Relu-squared activations
Int6 per-row quantization plus zstd compression to hit 16MB budget
